title: Primitive Flaming
description: Primitive Flaming lets you shoot flaming arrows by holding a bow or crossbow with flint and steel in your offhand.
body:
# Primitive Flaming

**Primitive Flaming** is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.5 that lets you shoot flaming arrows by holding a bow or crossbow in your main hand and a flint and steel in your offhand. Each shot consumes durability from the flint and steel.

Perfect for the early stages of your world when enchanting is too far and monsters are too close. This mod lets you light up arrows using simple, readily available items. Just get one iron ingot, one piece of flint to make a flint and steel, then get yourself a bow or crossbow and you are all set up!

## Features

- Shoot flaming arrows without the Flame enchantment.
- Works with both bows and crossbows.
- Durability of flint and steel decreases with each flaming arrow shot.

## Installation

1. Make sure you have Fabric Loader and Fabric API installed for Minecraft 1.21.5.
2. Place the download into your `mods` folder.
3. Launch Minecraft.

## Usage

- Hold a bow or crossbow in your main hand.
- Hold a flint and steel in your offhand.
- Shoot arrows normally; arrows will ignite.

---

Enjoy your flaming arrows!
